characters.name: Mario
characters.description: Mario and Princess Peach complaining. Mario is a popular video game character from theSuper Mario Bros.video game series. He appeared in "Super Mario Rescues the Princess", where he savesPrincess Peachfrom Bowser, and then they get into a fight.

characters.name: Road Runner
characters.description: Road Runner is the main protagonist of the Road Runner Cartoons by Warner Bros. as part ofLooney TunesandMerrie Melodies. He gets killed and eaten byWile E. Coyotein "Die Sweet Roadrunner Die".

characters.name: Wile E. Coyote
characters.description: Wile E. Coyote once more attempting to kill Road Runner Wile E. Coyote is a cartoon coyote who appeared in manyLooney Tunestheatrical cartoons and made-for-TV cartoons. Wile E. is the main protagonist of the episode "Die Sweet Roadrunner Die, in which he finally kills and eats theRoad Runner, but then realizes that he does not know what to do in his life now.
characters.media_title: Seth MacFarlane's Cavalcade of Cartoon Comedy
